query: SELECT id, orderNumber, status, establishmentId FROM orders WHERE establishmentId = 692831 AND (orderNumber LIKE '%38' OR orderNumber LIKE '%27' OR orderNumber LIKE '%7') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20;
